expectations.text: file evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json exists
file evals/demo-greeter/evals.json exists
evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json matches /should_trigger/

expectations.run: python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json'))['triggers']; assert any(x['should_trigger'] for x in t) and any(not x['should_trigger'] for x in t)"
expectations.text: command `python3 -c "import json; t=json.load(open('evals/demo-greeter/triggers.json'))['triggers']; assert any(x['should_trigger'] for x in t) and any(not x['should_trigger'] for x in t)"` exits 0
